# WeeSpaces: Premium Coworking & Managed Offices in Kerala & Tamil Nadu

## About Us
WeeSpaces is a flexible workspace provider offering coworking spaces, private offices, meeting rooms, managed offices, and virtual office solutions. We help freelancers, startups, growing companies, and enterprise teams move into fully-equipped professional workspaces without the cost and complexity of setting up a traditional office. We handle the infrastructure, high-speed internet, and daily facilities management so our members can focus entirely on their work.

## Locations
We operate in 4 primary locations:

### 1. Trivandrum
- **Focus**: IT enterprises, deep-tech startups, global software teams.
- **Location Advantage**: Close proximity to Technopark, the tech capital of Kerala.
- **Address**: 1st Floor, Relcon Plaza, Pattom, Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala 695004.
- **Pricing**: Hot Desks from ₹4,500/mo.

### 2. Kochi (Ernakulam)
- **Focus**: Startups, IT companies, entrepreneurs, sales agencies.
- **Location Advantage**: Situated on MG Road, the commercial heart of Kerala. 5 minutes from the Metro.
- **Address**: 4th floor, Palal Tower, Mahatma Gandhi Rd, Ravipuram, Perumanoor, Kochi, Kerala 682016.
- **Pricing**: Hot Desks from ₹5,000/mo.

### 3. Calicut (Kozhikode)
- **Focus**: Local businesses, ambitious freelancers, designers, creators.
- **Location Advantage**: Close to Cyberpark in East Nadakkave.
- **Address**: Door No. 2951/A, Ground floor, Neeloth Plaza, Holy Cross IMT Road, East Nadakkave, Kozhikode, Kerala 673001.
- **Pricing**: Hot Desks from ₹4,000/mo.

### 4. Coimbatore
- **Focus**: Enterprises, startups looking to bridge industrial legacy with IT.
- **Location Advantage**: Near Tidel Park and walking distance to Coimbatore International Airport.
- **Address**: Vidyanagar 3rd street, Civil Aerodrome Post, Kalapatti, Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu 641014.
- **Pricing**: Hot Desks from ₹5,000/mo.

## Services & Products

### Hot Desk
Flexible seating in an open coworking area. Ideal for freelancers and digital nomads. Includes high-speed WiFi and unlimited coffee.

### Dedicated Desk
A fixed, personal desk with lockable storage. Perfect for remote workers and small startup teams who want to leave their monitors overnight.

### Private Office / Managed Office
Fully furnished, enclosed, and secure cabins customized for teams (from 2 to 100+ people). Includes biometric access, custom IT infrastructure, and zero setup costs.

### Virtual Office
A professional business address for GST registration, company incorporation, and mail handling, without needing to rent physical space. Available across all our locations.

### Meeting & Conference Rooms
Acoustically treated rooms equipped with smart TVs, whiteboards, and video conferencing setups. Available on hourly or daily booking.

## Why Choose WeeSpaces vs Traditional Offices?
- **Zero Capital Expenditure**: No massive 6-10 month security deposits or interior fit-out costs.
- **Instant Move-in**: Fully furnished and managed workspaces ready to use from day one.
- **Flexibility**: Scale up or down easily with month-to-month or flexible agreements instead of rigid 3-5 year lock-ins.
- **Enterprise Amenities**: Dual leased-line internet, biometric security, pantry, lounge areas, and daily housekeeping included.
